description: Rules for computing derived fields from canonical data.

contract_duration_days.description: Number of days between start and end date

annualized_value.description: Total value annualized over contract duration

monthly_value.description: Total value divided by term months

churn_flag.description: True if contract has ended and is not auto-renewing

renewal_flag.expression: auto_renew == true OR renewal_date IS NOT NULL
renewal_flag.description: True if contract is set to renew
